name_en: Top-tier original M11947 Yellow As a classic design, the Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out Medium has no handles. This piece is crafted from Monogram canvas and striped fabric, featuring a double-sided design to showcase a trendy new look. The detachable shoulder strap makes it easy to carry crossbody, and it can also transform into a hobo bag via the side buckle. Dimensions: 31 × 28 × 14 cm
